entries.title: Per-agent library detail page with one-click install
entries.summary: Each entry in the library now has its own marketing-style detail page at /agents/library/:behavior with a back link to the library, a long description, "What goes in" / "What comes out" two-column lists, a Connected apps required section that surfaces each connector's current status (Connected / Not configured / etc), a Suggested setup tips list, and a bottom install band. Both top and bottom Install buttons spin up the agent with default config and route directly to its detail view. Library cards on /agents now read as "Learn more →" cards that link to this detail page instead of preview-jumping to the builder.

entries.title: Regenerate changelog
Agent library + focused prompt-first Settings tab
entries.summary: Add a "Library" section to /agents that lists every available agent template as a Catalyst-style card grid: name + category, the connector logos it integrates with, a one-line summary, the connectors it needs, a "Preview" link to the builder, and a one-click "Install" button that spins up the agent with default config and routes you straight to its detail view.

entries.title: Ship a consumer-facing changelog page
entries.summary: Add /changelog as a calm, daily-grouped feed of recent updates. The mix task `mix changelog.generate` walks `git log`, drops chore/ci/ test/wip commits, trims each commit body to its first paragraph, and writes a static `priv/changelog.json`. The page reads that JSON, groups entries by day with a sticky date column on the left and the title + summary on the right (the Stripe/Vercel-style pattern), and falls back to a quiet empty state. Sidebar Changelog link now goes to /changelog instead of github.com.

entries.title: Add Catalyst sub-nav tabs to the agent detail surface
entries.summary: Split the giant single-page agent detail into Overview / Connected apps / Skills / Settings tabs using a Catalyst-style underlined sub-nav. The connected accounts table that was overflowing into the Status and Updated columns is replaced with a clean row list whose columns wrap properly, so long Access copy ("Enabled: Gmail, Google Calendar… · Granted 5 OAuth scopes · Expires 2026-…") no longer collides with the status badge or the timestamp. Skip the redundant "Chief of Staff / Chief of Staff" subtitle when it equals the title.

entries.title: Quieter sidebar + dashboard header band micro-polish
entries.summary: Drop the "Quick actions" sidebar section — main nav already covers Agents and Connectors, and the dashboard New agent button covers the create flow. Hide the "0 open" Today counter when nothing is queued and remove the empty "Live" indicator on the Overview band so the header strips read as plain section headers.

entries.title: Polish architecture metrics + dashboard Refresh button
entries.summary: Convert the architecture_card metrics from a grid of bordered tiles into a description list with subtle dividers. Replace the dashboard header Refresh button (which was a plain Catalyst button overriding its own font-semibold and color) with a quiet inline button that respects the muted text-zinc-500 → text-zinc-950 hover rhythm.

entries.title: Tighten agents empty state and align workspace summary cards
entries.summary: Lift the agents-table empty state from a single line into a calm two-line message with a "Start with a template →" link. Strip the bordered card chrome from the dashboard workspace summary cards in favor of the same left-border pattern used by the Overview stats so the two sections share visual rhythm.

entries.title: Catalyst-aligned auth screen + tighter button + calmer empty states
entries.summary: Replace the home/sign-in eyebrow+panel with the Catalyst AuthLayout pattern: a centered white rounded card on zinc-100. Tighten the shared button primitive (drop min-h-9, rely on padding) so CTAs match the Catalyst 32px height. Drop the dotted-border empty card on the dashboard "Today" section.

entries.title: Calmer agent details and connector detail surfaces
entries.summary: Hide the agent details panel entirely when nothing is selected and strip the duplicate H3 + redundant CTA cluster, leaving status badge plus quiet inline Stop/Start/Delete actions. Rewrite the connector detail page from a stack of nested panels into editorial sections: flat header with back link, Connected Accounts as a divider list, Grant + OAuth setup as section bands, and the dark callback URL box swapped for a calm bordered zinc-50 mono strip.

entries.title: Calm dashboard tail: Health band + collapsed activity/logs
entries.summary: Convert Health & Monitoring panel to a section band with left dl and 4-cell queue strips. Collapse Operational Logs and Failures into a single "Operational activity" details disclosure with side-by-side columns. Drop the giant header chrome and emergency-red alarm tones in favor of the same calm Catalyst rhythm used by the rest of the page.

entries.title: Switch admin shell to Catalyst sidebar layout
entries.summary: Port Catalyst sidebar/navbar primitives into Phoenix components and replace the top-tab AdminNavigation with a sidebar layout across every admin surface. Strip eyebrow/page_header chrome, nested cards, dark inverted log panels, and rainbow stat rows on dashboard, agents, agent builder, connectors, how-it-works, and settings. Convert dense mid-page sections (Memory, Projects, Insights, Agent activity) to calm divider-list section bands, and tuck the project memory and new project forms behind <details> collapses so the dashboard scans like the Catalyst demo.

entries.summary: - Add large banner with MARAITHON logo - Add high-level architecture diagram showing data flow - Enhance architecture section with detailed component diagram - Add side-by-side comparison of traditional vs OTP agents - Add inspirational quote banner for use cases - Add footer with tech stack summary

entries.title: Add comprehensive documentation to integration test files
entries.summary: Document all integration test files with: - Product-driven explanations explaining what each test validates - "Why it matters" sections describing user impact if code breaks - ASCII architecture diagrams showing component interactions - Technical details covering API mappings and dependencies - Section comments for each describe block - @doc annotations on individual tests

entries.title: Fix test errors and warnings
entries.summary: - Fix agent_controller_test to properly set up scheduler for spawned agents - Simplify agent_supervisor_test to avoid sandbox access race condition - Fix runtime_test resume_all_agents to not spawn processes that crash - Remove unused import in cache_raw_body_test

entries.title: Add comprehensive test coverage (87.3%)
entries.summary: - Make HTTP clients injectable in OAuth providers (Google, Linear, Slack) - Make HTTP clients injectable in connectors (Gmail, Google Calendar) - Make Telegram API base URL configurable for testing - Fix Task.Supervisor usage in runtime supervisor - Add Anthropic provider tests with mocked API - Add effect_runner integration tests with retries - Add vault encryption/decryption tests - Add agent_supervisor tests - Add scheduler edge case tests - Update test_helper to start Bypass

entries.title: Add smoke testing, CONTRIBUTING.md, and test coverage
entries.summary: Smoke Testing: - Add scripts/smoke_test.sh for end-to-end verification - Checks: deps, compilation, formatting, migrations, tests, server health - Detects hardcoded secrets and reports TODO/FIXME counts

entries.title: Fix test configuration for local PostgreSQL
entries.summary: - Use $USER env var for database username (falls back to postgres) - Allow empty password for local peer authentication - Disable background workers (Scheduler, EffectRunner) in test mode to prevent database access before sandbox is configured

entries.title: Fix unused variable warnings
entries.summary: - effect_runner.ex: prefix unused result and timeout with underscore - http.ex: prefix unused url parameter with underscore - runtime.ex: remove unused Agent alias

entries.title: Fix deprecated Logger.warn calls
entries.summary: Replace all Logger.warn/1 and Logger.warn/2 with Logger.warning/2 across the codebase: - runtime/agent.ex (5 occurrences) - runtime/scheduler.ex (1 occurrence) - runtime/effect_runner.ex (3 occurrences) - llm/anthropic_provider.ex (2 occurrences) - behaviors/codebase_advisor.ex (1 occurrence)

entries.title: DRY: Extract shared HTTP and Crypto modules
entries.summary: - Create Maraithon.HTTP for consistent HTTP client interface - post_form, post_json, get, delete, put_json, patch_json - Proper error handling and JSON encoding/decoding - Charlist conversion for :httpc compatibility

entries.title: Security: Cache raw request body for webhook signature verification
entries.summary: - Add CacheRawBody plug to cache original request bytes before parsing - Update endpoint to use custom body reader - Update webhook controller to use cached raw body - Prevents signature verification failures due to JSON re-encoding differences

entries.title: Security: Add token encryption at rest with Cloak
entries.summary: - Add Cloak and Cloak.Ecto dependencies for AES-256-GCM encryption - Create Maraithon.Vault for encryption key management - Create Maraithon.Encrypted.Binary type for encrypted fields - Update OAuth.Token schema to use encrypted types for access_token and refresh_token - Add vault to application supervision tree - Configure allow_insecure_vault for dev/test environments - Production requires CLOAK_KEY environment variable

entries.title: Security: Make webhook signature verification fail closed
entries.summary: - Signature verification now requires explicit ALLOW_UNSIGNED_WEBHOOKS=true to bypass - Added allow_unsigned config option to all connectors (GitHub, Slack, WhatsApp, Linear, Telegram) - Default behavior is now to reject webhooks when secrets are not configured - Prevents accidental deployment without proper security configuration

entries.title: Security: Replace unsafe JSON parsing with safe error handling
entries.summary: - Replace all Jason.decode! calls with Jason.decode/1 and proper error handling - Prevents process crashes on malformed JSON responses from external APIs - Fix Linear Authorization header to include Bearer prefix - Affected files: OAuth modules (google, slack, linear) and connectors (telegram, whatsapp)

entries.title: Add Linear and Telegram connectors
entries.summary: Linear: - Add Linear OAuth helpers (authorize, exchange, GraphQL API) - Add Linear connector with webhook support - Support issue, comment, project, and cycle events - API helpers: create_issue, create_comment, update_issue_state - Topic format: linear:{team_key}

entries.title: Add Slack and WhatsApp connectors
entries.summary: Slack: - Add Slack OAuth helpers (authorize_url, exchange_code, verify_signature) - Add Slack connector with Events API support - Support message, reaction, app_mention, and member events - Topic format: slack:{team_id}:{channel_id}

entries.title: Update README with Google Calendar and Gmail connector docs
entries.summary: Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

entries.title: Add Google Calendar and Gmail connectors
entries.summary: - Add OAuth controller for Google auth flow - Add Google Calendar connector with push notification support - Add Gmail connector with Cloud Pub/Sub integration - Add webhook handlers for Google Calendar and Gmail - Add routes for OAuth (/auth/google) and webhooks - Add Google config (client_id, client_secret, redirect_uri, etc.)

entries.title: Add OAuth token storage and Google OAuth helpers
entries.summary: - Add oauth_tokens migration for storing user OAuth credentials - Add Token schema with expiry checking - Add OAuth context for token management (store, get, refresh, revoke) - Add Google OAuth helpers (authorize_url, exchange_code, refresh_token)

entries.title: Update README with framework vision and documentation
entries.summary: Comprehensive documentation covering: - Core vision: Agent = Prompt + State + Subscriptions + Tools - Architecture overview with connectors, runtime, and tools - Quick start guide - Behaviors (PromptAgent, custom behaviors) - Connectors (GitHub available, future roadmap) - How to build custom connectors - API reference - Configuration - Use cases (issue planner, personal assistant, code guardian) - Why OTP matters for AI agents

entries.title: Add Connector SDK and GitHub connector
entries.summary: Connector SDK for integrating external services with agents: - Connector behavior defining handle_webhook and verify_signature callbacks - Standard event format for normalized cross-connector events - Helper functions for publishing to PubSub

entries.title: Add PromptAgent: generic prompt-driven agent framework
entries.summary: The core primitive: Agent = Prompt + State + Subscriptions + Tools

entries.title: Add RepoPlanner behavior for codebase analysis and implementation planning
entries.summary: New behavior that analyzes repositories and generates implementation plans: - Indexes key entry point files (mix.exs, README, config, etc.) on startup - Receives planning tasks via /api/v1/agents/:id/ask endpoint - Generates detailed plans using LLM with actual codebase context - Writes plans to markdown files in PLANS/ directory

entries.title: Add GCP project configuration file
entries.summary: Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

entries.title: Add LLM spend tracking and dashboard display
entries.summary: - Create Spend module with Claude model pricing and cost calculation - Update AnthropicProvider to calculate and return usage/cost data - Add spend API endpoints (per-agent and total) - Update dashboard to show LLM calls, total spend, and per-agent spend - Add logging to EffectRunner for LLM call execution

entries.title: Fix: update phoenix_live_view to ~> 1.0 for Phoenix 1.8 compatibility
entries.summary: Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

entries.title: Add LiveView dashboard for agent monitoring
entries.summary: - Real-time dashboard with auto-refresh every 5 seconds - Agent list with status badges - Agent detail view showing config, budget, and runtime info - Recent events display for selected agent - Uses Tailwind CSS via CDN for styling

entries.title: Fix: capture emit_event return value to preserve sequence_num
entries.summary: The emit_event function returns a new data struct with updated sequence_num, but the return value was being discarded in several places, causing duplicate sequence numbers and constraint violations.

entries.title: Add mise.toml for dev environment management
entries.summary: - Erlang 26.2.2 and Elixir 1.16.2 (matching Dockerfile) - Includes common development tasks - Ensures consistent dev environment across team

entries.title: Initial commit: Maraithon - Long-lived LLM Agent Runtime
entries.summary: A durable Elixir/OTP runtime for LLM agents that can run for 48+ hours, surviving crashes and VM restarts using event sourcing.
